extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule Posting
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Columbia Gas Transmission, LLC (TCO) hereby notifies customers the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website has been updated. TCO reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

The current schedule has been updated to reflect maintenance activity on the following:

* Revised end date – Walgrove Compressor Station Maintenance – March 10-31,2026 (Previously scheduled to end on March 20, 2026)
* Line 1804 Pipeline Maintenance – April 9-21, 2026
* Line 10110 Pigging from Eagle to Hellertown – May 6-8, 2026
* Revised end date – Line KA West Wireline – June 1-12, 2026 (Previously schedule to end on June 10, 2026)
* Revised dates – Line 1711 Pipeline Maintenance – July 15 – August 17, 2026 (Previously scheduled for September 1-22, 2026)
* Line D590 Wireline Pigging – July 28-31, 2026
* Revised dates – Line 1711 Pipeline Maintenance – August 31 – September 18, 2026 (Previously scheduled for August 11-25, 2026)

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
TCO Construction and Maintenance Schedule 02-27-2026.pdf
